name: HWM_TM_COST_OVERRIDE_ATRBS
description: Attributes values for related versions of Cost override

columns.Name: TM_COST_OVERRIDE_ATRB_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key column containing a random generated number.  This column is not updatable.

columns.Name: TM_COST_OVERRIDE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key column from HWM_TM_COST_OVERRIDES table

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: validity start time of the row

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: validity end time of the row

columns.Name: DATA_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the attribute : Number, Varchar, Date and Timestamp

columns.Name: VALUE_TEXT
columns.Comments: Value of the attribute if its type is Varchar, null otherwise

columns.Name: VALUE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Value of the attribute if its type is Number, null otherwise

columns.Name: VALUE_TIMESTAMP
columns.Comments: Value of the attribute if it is of type Date or Timestamp, null otherwise

columns.Name: IS_DEFAULT_VALUE
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the attribute value is a default value that has not been overridden by the user. Value: Y/N

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
